creator: freebsd@schukraft.org
text:
Fresh install of 11.0, pkg install xdm fvwm-crystal [...]. Didn't install xorg-server or anything directly, relied on dependencies. This resulted in rather unusable X experience: no xf86-input-* packages (esp. keyboard and mouse! Just no working keyboard and mouse in X when it worked nice on 10.3), no xorg-fonts packages (xdm suddenly looking very strange).
These should have been installed as dependencies somewhere down the line imo.
